attempt_local_note: B (comparable-v3) is a strict-blocked, attribution-only R5.1 attempt with no figure-agent.closed-loop-attempt-state.v1 file. The canonical v4 repair-execution-packet machinery binds only from a repair_bound/repair_authorized attempt state, which does not exist for B; forcing it would require inventing that state. Per docs/figure-agent.md R5.2 guidance, C is materialized as B's hash-bound repair child with the minimal honest artifact set (adjudication, attribution, repaired tex, compile evidence, crops, provenance, regression) instead of the full v4 packet.

edit.rationale: anchor=east at x=1.13 placed the label right-edge at x=1.13 and extended the 1.268cm-wide text left to panel-x -0.262, protruding 0.262cm past the frame at x=0. On the SAME chain line the label cannot both clear the frame by >=0.10cm and clear the first S atom (left rim x=1.41) by >=0.08cm: available span 1.230cm < label width 1.268cm (short by 0.038cm). Per docs/figure-agent.md R5.2 step 6, the honest minimal one-node option is to place the label below the chain. It is centered at (2.22,1.42) to parallel the sibling 'DIB-derived segment' label (line 47, also y=1.42), keeping default (center) anchor.

measured_geometry_cm.method: pdftotext -bbox word extraction, self-calibrated per-render from the four Panel A 'S' atom glyphs (panel-x 1.55/2.00/2.45/2.90 at global y 13.45); recovered slope 28.346 pt/cm (standalone applies no page scaling) and first-S-atom center reproduced to panel-x 1.5500.

clearances_after_C.to_first_s_atom_cm: vertically separated ~0.78cm (label top ~panel-y 1.53 vs S atom bottom rim panel-y 2.31); no horizontal-line proximity

compile.strict_failure_cause: Pre-existing, unrelated Panel B finding: check_undeclared_geometry reports 3 label_crosses_semantic_path candidates (nearest_text 'increasing'/'sulfur'/'content') where the Panel B 'increasing sulfur content' arrow (line 73-74) crosses its own centered label (line 75). Identical set present in parent B (strict also failed there by design). Not introduced by this repair; the 'sulfur' word is from 'increasing sulfur content', not the moved Panel A label. Per docs/figure-agent.md line 259, B need not be strict-valid before C, and C is not required to fix unrelated strict failures.

evidence_crops.print_scale_note: Full figure at true publication width 155.9 mm rendered at 300 dpi (1841 px wide).

human_review.note: Step 10: no self-issued scaffold/review verdict. The orchestrator brings the after-render to the named human.
